title: Trigger: Scheduled Run
purpose: Runs on a server schedule or cron.

configFields.description: What event fires this Trigger node. Use manual for UI-driven runs; scheduled_run for server/cron runs.
Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.
